creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Rodrigo N. Hernandez from comment #1)
> Hello Chris. Thanks for the patch submission. Please set maintainer-approval
> to + on any patches you create for ports you are maintainer of. This will
> ensure it comes up in the Maintainer Approved saved search.

Will do.

Thanks! I should have remembered to do that, already, sorry. :(
